commit.message:
fix: usar primaryKey(autoIncrement: false) em colunas UUID

O SQLKit gera GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY quando .primaryKey
e usado sem parametros, o que PostgreSQL rejeita para colunas UUID.
Corrigido em todas as migrations e no MigrationRunner.

feat: pass judgment feedback to next execution iteration (#52)

Add `suggested_next_action` from judgment agent to execution context for next iteration. This allows the execution agent to receive actionable feedback when a task remains incomplete, enabling it to pursue fundamentally different approaches rather than repeating the same strategy.

Changes:
- Add `suggested_next_action` field to ExecutionContext
- Inject judgment feedback into execution agent prompt
- Store and forward `suggested_next_action` across iterations
- Add comprehensive test coverage for feedback mechanism

track up to 8, and manage selections with optimistic local UI updates and

search filter, dashboard CTA for empty state.

assertion, tsconfig paths for @gitdbt/shared runtime resolution.

commit.message:
Gustav 2.0: Competitive Intelligence Engine with anti-hallucination guards

Phase 1: Competitive Battlecards & Intelligence Stories
- competitive_intelligence.py: CompetitiveIntelligenceEngine with battlecards,
  action playbooks (ROI), threat correlations, inaction cost calculation
- Head-to-head comparison across 8 dimensions per competitor
- 6 correlation patterns (Content Gap Attack, Digital Erosion, etc.)
- Integrated into guardian_agent.py execute()

Phase 2: Threat History & Predictive Analytics
- threat_history.py: ThreatHistoryManager with snapshots, deltas,
  trend prediction (linear regression), recurring threat detection
- Delta categories: NEW, ESCALATED, MITIGATED, RESOLVED, RECURRING

Phase 3: Executive Intelligence Briefs
- intelligence_brief.py: IntelligenceBriefGenerator for CEO-readable
  summaries with key findings, top actions, and trend predictions

Phase 4: Automated Monitoring & Alerts
- guardian_pulse.py: GuardianPulse with ContentHashTracker for
  competitor change detection (title, content, schema, pages)

Anti-Hallucination System (hallucination_guard.py):
- 4-layer protection: Data Provenance, Prompt Guardrails,
  Post-generation Validation, Transparency Markers
- All LLM prompts include anti-hallucination suffix
- Financial estimates wrapped with best/worst case ranges
- OutputValidator checks LLM output against known facts
- IntelligenceGuard provides data quality scoring

Tests: 115 new tests (545 total, 0 failures)

refactor: Dashboard grid layout — 10 apps max per row, widgets 2x2 sized

Changes:
- Grid System: Changed from responsive minmax() to fixed 20-column grid with grid-auto-flow: dense
  - Apps: 2 columns wide (span 2) = 10 apps max per row
  - Widgets: 4 columns wide, 2 rows tall (span 4/2) = 2x2 app size

- Widget Sizing: Widgets now properly span 4 columns and 2 rows with full height
  - Next to a 2x2 widget, 2 apps can fit vertically
  - Better visual hierarchy and content display

- Settings Updated: "Items Per Row" → "Apps Per Row" (2-10 options)
  - Shows how many apps fit per row
  - Explains that widgets are 2x2 sized relative to apps
  - New options: 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10 Apps

- Layout: Maintains responsive feel while providing predictable column counts
  - grid-auto-flow: dense ensures efficient space usage
  - Apps at span 2, Widgets at span 4/2

fix: ad-hoc codesign binary after upgrade on macOS

binary after replacement to restore execution under elevated privileges.

Mini player: instant show + progress bar + EQ bars + glow + song fade

UX: clicking from Saved Songs, History, Continue Singing now shows
the mini player immediately — no page jump or manual scrolling.

Visual upgrades:
- Live progress bar at top of mini player (polls ytPlayer 2×/sec)
- Animated EQ bars (4 bars, staggered bounce) — pause when video pauses
- Purple glow pulse on mini player when new song loads
- Smooth fade transition on title/channel when song changes
- Play button upgraded: gradient + glow shadow
- Thumbnail gets purple shadow glow on song load
- Slide-in animation now uses spring-like cubic-bezier
- "Back to Player" text shortened to "↑ Player" for compactness

Behaviour fixes:
- History card click: showMiniPlayer() called immediately
- Fav card click: showMiniPlayer() called immediately + updatePlayerFavBtn()
- Resume banner: removed scrollIntoView, now shows mini player in place
- EQ bars driven by onPlayerStateChange (play/pause/buffer events)
- Progress bar resets to 0% and restarts on each new song

CSS v18→v19, JS v44→v45, HTML updated

commit.message:
Fix scheduler duplicate task race condition and add test suite

Move claimTask() before queue.enqueue() in the scheduler loop to prevent
the next poll from re-discovering tasks still waiting in the queue.
Anchor interval task scheduling to the original next_run time to prevent
cumulative drift. Extract createSchema() in db.ts for test reuse.

Add vitest with 31 tests covering task-scheduler (claim-before-enqueue,
computeNextRun drift/skip), db (CRUD, getDueTasks, message queries),
and group-queue (serialization, parallelism, error recovery).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: invert spin ring and torque arc directions to match y-down coords

The 2D cross product in y-down canvas gives positive angVel for CW
rotation on screen, but the renderer was showing positive as CCW.
Negate dir in _drawTorqueArc and drawSpinRing so arrows match the
actual rotation/torque direction. Update info tip and reference page
from "counterclockwise" to "clockwise".

the original pipeline). 1,399 new collection tags added across 70 batches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix chain depth semantics, sign hash bytes, and harden invariants

- walkChain: use depth counter instead of len(visited) to prevent
  false ErrChainDepthExceeded in star topologies
- Factory: sign hash bytes (not canonical string) so signature commits
  to stored hash; construct via NewEvent/NewBootstrapEvent (immutability)
- evaluateLeaf: guard Outcome.Unwrap with IsSome check (prevents panic
  on zero-value LeafNode)
- grantAndPersist: generate unique conversation ID per grant instead
  of hardcoded magic string
- Trust Score/ScoreInDomain: use RLock with non-mutating getOrDefault
- withUpdates: always deep-copy metadata map (immutability)
- Store Append: return error on edge.created content type mismatch
- TestTickLayerOrdering: protect shared order slice with mutex
- Tick engine: track quiesced explicitly instead of arithmetic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: derive cashUsd from USDC holding so cash floor check works with live wallet

fetchWalletPortfolio returns cashUsd:0 with USDC as an SPL token in holdings.
buildLivePortfolio was using base.cashUsd (always 0) for the mandate cash floor,
blocking every buy with "USDC cash $0.00 at cash floor". Now cashUsd is computed
as base.cashUsd + any USDC holding value, so both live wallets and mock portfolios
report accurate cash available for the mandate enforcement layer.

Add Phase 0.5 observation test script for end-to-end agent validation

inbox) on exit via Ctrl+C trap.

commit.message:
fix: import fetch, bulk selection limit, session expiry detection (#152)

* fix: replace plain fetch with fetchApi and remove company-specific wording

- Import tags/folders: switch default fetcher from fetch to fetchApi
  so NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH is prepended correctly
- Passkey/security-key signin: use fetchApi instead of fetch(withBasePath())
- Folder selector: remove folders.length===0 guard that hid the section
  on fresh installs with no folders
- ESLint: add no-restricted-syntax rule to prevent plain fetch in client code
- i18n: replace "company account" / "社内アカウント" with neutral wording

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: cap bulk selection at 100 items to match API limit

The bulk API routes reject >100 IDs but the UI had no limit, causing
a generic error. Add MAX_BULK_SELECTION=100 to helpers, propagate
through useBulkSelection hook (atLimit flag), disable unchecked
checkboxes at limit, and show a warning message in the toolbar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect session expiry on vault lock screen via API 401

Auth.js v5 beta returns HTTP 200 from /api/auth/session even without
a cookie, so useSession() never transitions to "unauthenticated".
Instead, detect 401 from vault API calls during unlock attempts and
throw VaultUnlockError(UNAUTHORIZED). The lock screen catches this
and shows a session-expired card with a sign-in button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update folder tests to match new always-visible folder selector

The folder select section now renders even with no folders (to allow
folder creation on fresh installs). Update tests to expect the
selector with a single __none__ option instead of being hidden.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: show folder section label with "no folders yet" message when empty

Instead of hiding the entire folder section or showing an empty select,
display the section label with an amber "No folders yet" message. The
select dropdown only renders when folders exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix output parser to handle language-tagged fences, free-text content, and field aliases

Test 4 revealed 0 blocks flowing through the pipeline despite agents producing
them. Three root causes fixed: (1) language-tagged fences (```markdown, ```sql)
now recognized when preceded by a type header via new starts_with_fence() helper;
(2) blocks with free-text content (after --- separator) no longer produce empty
content — join_lines() fallback in dispatch_block(); (3) required_reviewers and
reviewers accepted as aliases for requires_consensus_from, plus proposal/decision
aliases in REVIEW blocks. 29 tests pass (19 existing + 10 new).
